description.zh-Hans: 应用色阶调整：逐通道或整体调整输入/输出黑白点、伽马值。支持RGB整体、红/绿/蓝独立通道以及Alpha通道调整。提供直观的色阶映射：输入范围[iBlack, iWhite]映射到输出范围[oBlack, oWhite]，伽马控制中间调曲线曲率。
description.en: Applies levels adjustment: per-channel or combined input/output black/white points and gamma. Supports RGB combined, individual R/G/B channels, and alpha channel. Maps input range [iBlack, iWhite] to output range [oBlack, oWhite], with gamma controlling mid-tone curvature.

triggers.zh-Hans: 色阶, 曲线, 色阶调整, 色阶曲线, 色调调整, 伽马校正, 黑点, 白点
triggers.en: levels, curves, levels adjustment, tone curve, tonal adjustment, gamma correction, black point, white point

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 调整图像的黑点和白点以增强对比度，同时校正伽马值。
exampleUsage.en: Adjust black and white points to enhance contrast while correcting gamma.
